overview.description: The iShares iBonds 2033 Term High Yield and Income ETF (IBHM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of USD-denominated, high yield and BBB-rated corporate bonds maturing in 2033. The fund will terminate in December 2033.
infoTable: Bloomberg 2033 Term High Yield and Income Index
